changes: Execution readback now exposes top-level return_gate_status, continuation_contract_reason, exact_next_action, final_response_allowed, and refuses_final_response.
Execution validator rejects stale top-level continuation reason, exact next action, final allowance, and refusal fields.
Production readiness asserts generated execution readbacks carry these top-level fields.
The v0.3 execution ledger fixture was updated to keep exact_next_action canonical.
